title: forge-sdlc monorepo registry
description: Schema for the multi-repo registry file (.forge/monorepo.json). Each repo in a brownfield setup declares its location, role in the dependency graph, owner, and per-repo config.

defaultBranch.description: Default branch to merge into. Defaults to 'main' if not set.

name.description: Short identifier, kebab-case. Used in branch names and PR titles.

path.description: Filesystem path to the repo, relative to the monorepo root (this repo's root).

role.description: primary = the repo where the main change lives. consumer = repos that import from the primary. shared-types = the type definitions. infra = deploy / CI / config repos.

owner.description: GitHub team or user that owns the repo. Used for auto-assignment and CODEOWNERS lookup.

dependsOn.description: Names of other repos in the registry this repo depends on. Used to determine build order.

prStrategy.description: How PRs are opened. branch = in-repo branch. fork = cross-repo fork PR.

forbiddenPaths.description: Per-repo path patterns that should not be edited by the implementer. In addition to the global ones (lockfiles, linter configs, .env*).

conventions.description: Path to a markdown file with per-repo conventions. The architect reads this before designing changes that touch this repo.
